questions.text: What is the primary purpose of drawing a random sample from a population?
options: To include every member of the population
To obtain a representative subset for inference
To guarantee the sample mean equals the population mean
To eliminate the need for statistical analysis

questions.text: Which statement best describes a population in medical statistics?
options: The entire group of individuals relevant to the research question
Any group of 100 or more subjects
The sample plus all excluded participants
The difference between a sample statistic and the population parameter due to chance
